seoTitle: Taylors Hill vs Teal Point — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Taylors Hill and Teal Point. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Taylors Hill vs Teal Point: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Taylors Hill and Teal Point.
heading: Taylors Hill vs Teal Point — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Taylors Hill, Victoria and Teal Point, Victoria. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Teal Point has a lower overall climate risk score (39/100) compared to Taylors Hill (42/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Taylors Hill or Teal Point safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Taylors Hill has a flood risk score of 58/100, while Teal Point scores 59/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Taylors Hill scores 52/100 for bushfire risk. Teal Point scores 15/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Taylors Hill or Teal Point?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Teal Point has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.85% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
